section_title: Suits stayed on winding up order.-- When a winding up order has been made or a provisional liquidator has been
content:
250. Suits stayed on winding up order.-- When a winding up order has been made or a provisional liquidator has been
appointed, no suit or other legal proceedings shall be proceeded with or commenced against the company except by leave of
the Court and subject to such terms as the Court may impose.
